hero.description: Dim-dim šà-zu 40+ An-na model. NFT OpenSea Zora didli dù. Nu nig-gal-la, zubi gibil dim-dim.

story.title: Ki-ag-ga U4-gibil
story.p1: Níg-gibil zi-ga šà. Nu níg-gal-la, ZexAI ki-sur-ra gub-ba kal-ga: <1>Ad-da dumu-munus ki-ag-ga u4-gibil.</1>
story.p2: Ad-da dumu-munus gig-ga u4-nu-ná igi-bar? Níg-gi-na nu, silim-ma šà-húl.
story.p3: ZexAI zi-ga kal-ga nu-šub. É-gal nu; <1>É-dub dim-dim kal-ga, u4-gibil níg-gál.</1>
story.p4: Ki-sur-ra "An-na ù NFT" dù, ad-da dumu-munus ki-ag-ga ki-en-gi, ug3 Web3 ku4.

campaign.title: ZexAI Níg-gal-la
campaign.subtitle: Ki-sur-ra dadag, ki-ag-ga. Dim-dim, NFT dù, gál, alan gibil ku4.

vision.agentDesc: "U4-gibil" sar, Synapse dim-dim mah dù. Nu dub-sar kal-ga.
vision.mintDesc: ZexAI ug3 gal dim-dim. An-na alam zubi dù, NFT ki-lam gal dù.

tokenomics.title: $ZEX Níg-gal-la
tokenomics.desc: Zal-zál, u4-gid, ug3 ki-sur-ra. Níg-gi-na nu. Lugal 1 mu kél.
tokenomics.utilityDesc: Lugal kù-babbar gál, dim-dim silim, "Sa10 ù IzI" ku4.

robot.title: ZexAI Alan Dub-sar
robot.desc: ZexAI Alan Zubi mah. AI agents ù robot didli dù. $ZEX kù-babbar activation ù monetization gál.
robot.raffleDesc: ICO <1>10,000 ZEX</1> sa10, ki-lam ku4. Alan gibil gál!

faq.title: Dub-sar Kin-Kin
faq.subtitle: Kin-zu šub.
faq.a1: $ZEX ICO u4-gibil ku4. Dub-sar Twitter ù Discord.
faq.a3: ZexAI alam dù, OpenSea Zora ku4 diš tag.
faq.a4: Nu níg-gal-la, ki-sur-ra u4-gid. Lugal $ZEX 1 mu kél.
